personal.titulo: Software Engineer | Full Stack Developer | Telecommunications Infrastructure Specialist
personal.disponibilidad: Available for on-site, remote, and hybrid projects
personal.descripcion: Full Stack software engineer with experience building modern web applications using Python, JavaScript, React, Flask, and Supabase. Specialized in REST API design, secure JWT authentication, and PostgreSQL database management. Backed by solid experience in telecommunications infrastructure and low-voltage systems, including fiber optic deployment, structured cabling, and network architecture.
